name: Most Innovative Routing System
summary: A token-efficient routing agent that uses deterministic task analysis, compact prompt construction, validation, repair, and Fireworks-compatible model selection.

version_3_demo.purpose: Demonstrate routing behavior, validation, and provider boundaries.
version_3_demo.local_model_policy: Ollama local inference may be used only as demo/development behavior.

version_4_final_target.inference_policy: All semantic inference goes through FIREWORKS_BASE_URL with models sourced from ALLOWED_MODELS.

version_5_candidate.purpose: Evaluate llama.cpp local-first execution with Fireworks-compliant fallback.
version_5_candidate.inference_policy: Use local inference only for certified Work Jurisdictions. Until a GGUF model artifact and benchmark evidence exist, route through Fireworks fallback.

version_5_qualification.policy: The suite is used before live task execution to produce reviewable qualification evidence. Live /input/tasks.json processing never executes this benchmark and never mutates model authorization.

final_constraints: no local LLM inference in final mode
no Lemonade or Ollama dependency in final mode
